dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4581 IS: Chinese Communist Party Sanctions Shot Clock Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of Florida introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 to require inclusion of certain foreign persons in the Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Companies List.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Chinese Communist Party Sanctions Shot Clock Act or the CCP Sanctions Shot Clock Act.

section.header: Requirement of inclusion of certain foreign persons in Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Companies List
section.text: Section 8531 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsection (b) as subsection (c); and
by inserting after subsection (a) the following new subsection (b):

subsection.text: Not later than one year after the President submits a report under subsection (a), the Secretary of the Treasury shall—

paragraph.text: add to the Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Companies List any foreign person that—

subparagraph.text: is indicated in that report as qualifying for inclusion in that list; and
has not already been added to that list; and

paragraph.text: if any foreign person is added under paragraph (1), publish in the Federal Register a newly revised Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Companies List.
